---
title: tome-of-xp
description: "个人实践后的经验记录，偏向做过之后的复盘和心得。"
page-layout: full
toc: false
body-class: category-page
listing:
  id: category-posts
  contents: [../posts/**/*.qmd, ../pages/**/*.qmd]
  include:
    categories: tome-of-xp
  sort: date desc
  fields:
    - date
    - title
    - categories
  type: table
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
---

:::{#category-posts}
:::
